0.text: Centrilobular nodular densities with a tree-in-bud pattern in the lateral aspects of both upper lobes

1.text: Centrilobular nodular densities with a tree-in-bud pattern in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Centrilobular nodular densities with a tree-in-bud pattern in the posterobasal segments of both lower lobes

4.text: Fibrosis in the bilateral apical segments

5.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
